docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED JAN-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, RICARDO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-05-2018 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF TINA LEWIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICARDO MYERS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF TINA LEWIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICARDO MYERS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-11-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF TINA LEWIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICARDO MYERS IS PRESENT. PARTIES INDICATED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH A SCHEDULE OF ONE YEAR TO COMPLETE SETTLEMENT TERMS. CONTINUE FOR SIX MONTHS AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE SEPTEMBER HEARING, CONTINUE SIX MONTHS AGAIN WITH THE AGREEMENT IF NO APPEARANCES AT THAT HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF RICARDO MYERS UPDATING ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT MYERS, RICARDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, TINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MYERS, RICARDO LEWIS HAS PROVED THAT MYERS LIVED WITH HER PERIODICALLY BUT NOT THAT HE AGREED TO PAY RENT OR SHARE BILLS. ACCORDINGLY LEWIS IS NOT ENTITLED TO RECOVER MONEY FROM HIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEWIS, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, RICARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
